project_type: Python AWS CDK application - serverless sleep audio processing pipeline
build_system: pip with requirements.txt, aws-cdk CLI for synthesis
test_framework: pytest with aws_cdk.assertions, fixtures in tests/conftest.py
build_command: pip install -r requirements.txt -r requirements-dev.txt && cdk synth
verification_instructions: 1. Run pytest tests/ to confirm all tests pass. 2. Run cdk synth to verify stack synthesis. 3. Run cdk synth -c environment=dev, cdk synth -c environment=stage, cdk synth -c environment=prod to verify multi-env support.
environment_constraints: COMMON_DEPENDENCIES network mode - can install from PyPI. No Docker daemon available for container builds. Python 3.11 via pyenv. Node.js needed for CDK CLI.
contribution_requirements: TDD-first: write failing tests before implementing. Stack code in cdk_base/. Tests in tests/unit/. CDK context controls env-specific behavior. Conventional commit messages. Must update ARCHITECTURE.md after changes.
key_patterns: Tests use a shared 'template' fixture from conftest.py that synthesizes CdkBaseStack. Tests use aws_cdk.assertions for template matching. Lambda tests import handler directly. State machine tests parse the serialized definition JSON. The stack currently takes no parameters - multi-env context is not yet implemented. app.py creates a single CdkBaseStack instance.
directory_structure: cdk_base/ - Stack definitions (cdk_base_stack.py). lambda/ - Lambda function code. tests/unit/ - CDK assertion and Lambda handler tests. .github/workflows/ - CI pipeline. Root files: app.py (entry point), cdk.json (config), ARCHITECTURE.md (design docs).
